summary: 8 files exceed 800-line limit (2 critical). 8 functions >50 lines. _process() in merlin_ai.gd is 68 lines. 338 deep-nesting instances. Signal management weak in game_controller. No hot-loop allocation issues found.

checks.description: 3.7x over limit. Contains generate_card() (161 lines), _try_llm_generation() (98), check_guardrails_phase8() (88), insert_arc_card() (59). Candidate for split: omniscient_card_gen.gd + omniscient_guardrails.gd + omniscient_arc.gd
2.8x over limit. Contains _process() (68 lines), generate_sequential() (123), _try_init_ollama() (129). Candidate for split: merlin_ai_core.gd + merlin_ai_bg_tasks.gd + merlin_ai_init.gd
Pure data file. Acceptable as data dict container. Low priority.
UI file 1.35x over limit. _process() used with set_process(false) guard — acceptable.
God reducer — handles ALL action types in one match block. Should dispatch to StoreRun, StoreMetaReducer, etc.
211 lines of mixed UI + game logic. Should split to _resolve_choice_pre(), _resolve_choice_effects(), _resolve_choice_post().
222 lines. Parses + validates + wraps card in single function. Extract _parse_card_from_text(), _validate_card_structure() as helpers.

_process() is 68 lines. However it has correct set_process(false) guard when idle. Polling logic is valid. Low real-world impact — but violates 50-line function rule. Extract _poll_bg_tasks() + _poll_swarm_health() helpers.
22 instances of 5+ tab nesting in blacklist and label-extraction loops. Use early-return guards and helper functions to flatten.

add_child(_parchment) called in _resolve_choice() but no explicit queue_free or disconnect on scene exit. Risk of orphan node on fast repeated calls. Should use autoconnect CONNECT_ONE_SHOT or check is_instance_valid.
No hot-loop allocation issues detected. Loops are bounded by _active_bg_tasks.size() which is small (0-4). PASS.

invariants_verified: set_process(false) guard present in merlin_ai.gd _process() — PASS
All signals in merlin_store.gd connected in _ready() — PASS
add_child nodes in merlin_store.gd are persistent autoload children — PASS (no orphan risk)
